calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-13-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-13-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Andrew A. Ford, Esq. appeared for plaintiff FIA Card Services, N.A. formerly known as MBNA America Bank, N.A.
No appearance by defendant Andre L. Wingate.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 31, 2008.
Declaration of Gary Springs in Lieu of Direct Testimony, CCP Section 98 was filed today, April 13, 2009.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed today, April 13, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 13, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff FIA Card Services, N.A. formerly known as MBNA America Bank, N.A., and against defendant Andre L. Wingate as follows:

Principal - $7,248.13.
Interest - $839.99.
Attorney's Fees - $800.00.
Costs - $245.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $9,133.12.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Set For Trial On Apr-13-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
